apihelp-query+checkuser-summary: Hubi ciwaannada IP ee uu isticmaalo isticmaale la bixiyay ama magacyada isticmaalayaasha ee uu isticmaalo ciwaan IP la bixiyay.
apihelp-query+checkuser-summary-api-disa: '''API-kan waxaa joojiyay maamulka goobta. Weydiinta API-ga ma soo celin doonto wax xog ah.''' {{int:apihelp-query+checkuser-summary}}
apihelp-query+checkuser-paramvalue-reque: Soo hel ciwaanka IP ee isticmaale la beegsaday.
Soo hel ficillada uu sameeyay ciwaanka IP la beegsaday ama xadka.
Soo hel isticmaalayaasha ka yimid ciwaanka IP la beegsaday ama xadka.
apihelp-query+checkuser-param-target: Magaca isticmaalaha, ciwaanka IP, ama xadka CIDR la hubinayo.
apihelp-query+checkuser-param-timecond: Xadka waqtiga xogta isticmaalaha (sida "-2 weeks" ama "2 weeks ago").
apihelp-query+checkuser-param-xff: Isticmaal xogta XFF halkii laga isticmaali lahaa ciwaanka IP.
apihelp-query+checkuserlog-param-target: Isticmaalaha la hubiyay, ciwaanka IP, ama xadka CIDR.
apihelp-query+checkuserformattedblockinf: Soo celi faahfaahinta xannibaadda oo qaabaysan ee xannibaadaha guud ee saameeya isticmaalaha hadda.
apihelp-query+globalcontributions-summar: Muuji wax ka beddeladii ugu dambeeyay ee dhammaan wiki-yada ee isticmaalaha diiwaangashan la bixiyay.
apihelp-query+globalcontributions-param-: Magaca isticmaalaha ee la raadinayo (waa inuusan noqon IP).
Meesha laga sii wado tirinta si loo sii wado taxitaanka.
apihelp-query+globalcontributions-exampl: Muuji wax ka beddeladii ugu dambeeyay ee dhammaan wiki-yada ee isticmaalaha la bixiyay.
Muuji wax ka beddeladii ugu dambeeyay ee dhammaan wiki-yada ee isticmaalaha la bixiyay laga bilaabo meel sii wadis, iyadoo leh xad gaar ah.
apierror-checkuser-timelimit: Waa inaad isticmaashaa xadka waqtiga saxda ah (sida "-2 toddobaad" ama "2 toddobaad ka hor").
apierror-checkuser-nosuchuser: Ma jiro isticmaale leh magacan isticmaale
apierror-checkuser-disabled: Weydiinta API-ga ee 'checkuser' waxaa joojiyay maamulka goobta.
checkuser-api-help-paramvalue-direction-: Ku tax kii ugu da'da weyn hore. Fiiro gaar ah: $1from waa inuu ka horreeyaa $1to.
Ku tax kii ugu cusub hore (caadi ahaan). Fiiro gaar ah: $1from waa inuu ka dambeeyaa $1to.
checkuser-api-useragent-clienthints-revi: Isticmaale $1 ma aha qoraaga dib u eegista $2
checkuser-api-useragent-clienthints-mapp: Khariidadaha tilmaamaha macmiilka ayaa horey u jira $1 $2
checkuser-api-useragent-clienthints-call: $1 $2 aad buu u duugoobay si loogu oggolaado in la diiwaangeliyo xogta tilmaamaha macmiilka
checkuser-api-useragent-clienthints-expl: {{SITENAME}} waxay ururisaa xogta tilmaamaha macmiilka ee user-agent si ay uga caawiso la socodka burburinta iyo xadgudubka. Faahfaahin dheeraad ah ka eeg https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Extension:CheckUser/Client_Hints
apihelp-logout-param-checkuserclienthint: Xogta tilmaamaha macmiilka ee la socda codsiyada ApiLogout. Kaliya isticmaal gudaha nidaamka.
checkuser-ip-auto-reveal-expiry-invalid: Mudada auto-reveal ee la bixiyay waa khalad.
checkuser-ip-auto-reveal-missing-permiss: Ma lihid oggolaanshaha loo baahan yahay si aad u isticmaasho muujinta IP-ga si toos ah.
checkuser-suggestedinvestigations-case-u: Aqoonsiga kiiska ee la bixiyay ma jiro.
Astaanta baaritaannada la soo jeediyay lama shidin
